summary: Iteration 59: Four critical fixes tested - 1) Demo account cleanup, 2) List for Sale/Trade buttons on record detail, 3) File serving proxy endpoint, 4) Photo upload URL handling. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.

issues: Album cover images from placeholder URLs show as black squares (ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED) - cosmetic, not a functional issue

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/files/serve/other_app/test.png returns 403 with 'Access denied' - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/files/serve/honeygroove/test/test_img.png returns 200 with image content-type - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/upload returns {file_id, path, url} where url contains /api/files/serve/ path - PASSED
Backend: Uploaded file is accessible via returned proxy URL - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/explore feed excludes demo/test users - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/feed excludes demo/test users - PASSED
Backend: Admin user authentication works (is_hidden but can still authenticate) - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/records/{id}/detail returns owner info - PASSED
Backend: Record has artist, title, discogs_id, cover_url, year for listing prefill - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/explore/suggested-collectors excludes demo/test users - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/buzzing excludes demo users - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/listings and /api/listings/my endpoints work - PASSED
Frontend: RecordDetailPage shows 'List for Sale' button [data-testid='list-for-sale-btn'] for record owner - PASSED
Frontend: RecordDetailPage shows 'Offer to Trade' button [data-testid='offer-to-trade-btn'] for record owner - PASSED
Frontend: Clicking 'List for Sale' navigates to /honeypot - PASSED
Frontend: ISOPage listing modal opens with prefilled artist/album from query params - PASSED
Frontend: SettingsPage avatar upload uses response.data.url (line 117) - VERIFIED
Frontend: ISOPage listing photos upload uses resp.data.url (line 281) - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: collection.py lines 515-533: GET /api/files/serve/{path:path} proxy endpoint correctly checks honeygroove/ namespace prefix for security
collection.py line 494: Upload endpoint returns public_url with FRONTEND_URL prefix pointing to proxy
collection.py line 527: File serve response includes Cache-Control headers (1 year immutable)
database.py lines 94-106: get_hidden_user_ids() correctly queries is_test, is_hidden, and username/email patterns
RecordDetailPage.js lines 172-195: List for Sale / Offer to Trade buttons wrapped in isOwner check with proper data-testid
RecordDetailPage.js lines 178,188: Navigation URLs include all record fields (artist, album, discogs_id, cover_url, year)
ISOPage.js lines 166-185: Query param prefill logic reads create, artist, album, discogs_id, cover_url, year and clears params
SettingsPage.js line 117: Avatar upload uses response.data.url with fallback to constructed path
ISOPage.js line 281: Listing photo upload uses resp.data.url with fallback
seed_data_creation: Created temporary test user uitester59 with 2 records (Abbey Road, Rumours) - cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 59: Four fixes tested successfully. 1) File serve proxy at /api/files/serve/{path} works with security (403 for wrong namespace, 200 for valid honeygroove/ paths). Upload returns URL pointing to proxy. 2) RecordDetailPage shows List for Sale and Offer to Trade buttons only for record owner. Clicking navigates to /honeypot with query params. 3) ISOPage reads query params and prefills listing form. 4) SettingsPage and ISOPage use response.data.url from upload. 5) Hidden user filtering excludes is_test, is_hidden, demo/test usernames, example.com/test.com emails from feeds. No demo content visible in any public feed.

screenshots_taken.collection_01.png: Collection page showing 2 records (Abbey Road, Rumours)
screenshots_taken.record_detail_02.png: Record detail page for Abbey Road showing List for Sale and Offer to Trade buttons
screenshots_taken.honeypot_03.png: Honeypot page with List a Record modal prefilled with Abbey Road / The Beatles (1969)

verified_features.list_for_sale_button: Visible on record detail for owner, data-testid='list-for-sale-btn'
verified_features.offer_to_trade_button: Visible on record detail for owner, data-testid='offer-to-trade-btn'
